name: ON DUTY: ALL CLEAR
short_description: The peace of Prison Sector 7 is in your hands. As a rookie guard, you must maintain 7 days without a single incident. Investigate the cells, suppress prisoners, and keep the peace within the facility Don't let your guard down. A single incident will reset your accident-free record to 'Day 0'.
detailed_description:
[Maintain Order in the Prison]

Welcome to the notorious Prison Sector 7.
Your goal is simple: achieve 7 days without an incident to secure your transition to a full-time position.
Complete the missions assigned by the warden every day and maintain absolute order within the prison.

⚠️ WARNING: A single incident will reset your accident-free record to 'Day 0'. Peace is more fragile than you think.

[Immersive Physical Inspection]

Forget simple point-and-click searches. delivers detailed first-person interactions.

  • Examine: Carefully inspect prisoners’ belongings and identify any contraband.

  • Investigate: Doubt everything in the cell and uncover the prisoners' hidden schemes.

  • Subdue: Subdue defiant prisoners with your baton to demonstrate the power of authority.

[Unpredictable Inmates and Missions]

A wide variety of random missions await you every day.

  • Diverse Prisoners: A cast of unique prisoners will threaten the peace of the prison in various ways.

  • Daily Missions: 7 distinct mission types are ready, ranging from prisoner suppression and contraband seizure to criminal investigation.

  • Time Pressure: Complete all assigned tasks within the limited time.

reviews.review_text: There are no bad ideas — only terrible execution. A perfect example of this is this game
